summary: All round 1 findings addressed. T1-M1 (tsup.config.ts quote style) fixed. The three new changes from security-auditor findings are well-executed. No new issues found.

round1_findings_resolved.note: tsup.config.ts now uses single quotes throughout, consistent with .prettierrc singleQuote: true.
ajv placement noted in decisions.md as T6 implementer concern. Correct disposition — no T1 action required.

new_changes_review.note: .npmrc is the right place for registry credentials and auth tokens. Adding it to .gitignore prevents accidental secret commit. No issues.

esbuild transitive dependency pinned via npm overrides to address a security advisory. Using ^0.28.1 allows patch updates within 0.28.x while enforcing the minimum. This is the correct npm-native mechanism (not resolutions, which is yarn-specific). No issues.

Self-documenting guard for GHSA-5xrq-8626-4rwp — prevents a future developer from accidentally adding --ui scripts while still on vitest ^1.5. The comment is precise: names the advisory, names the fix version (>=3.2.6), and states the constraint clearly. No issues.

Prevents accidental `npm publish` before Task 16's release pipeline. The //prepublishOnly sibling comment explains the intent. The guard exits 1 with an actionable message. This is a good safety net — Task 16 will remove it as part of the release prep. No issues.

passing_checks.note: All four string literals in tsup.config.ts are now single-quoted.
npm overrides field is at the root package.json level, which is correct — nested package overrides fields are ignored by npm. The ^0.28.1 range is appropriate.

passing_checks.check: prepublishOnly guard does not break build/test
passing_checks.note: prepublishOnly only runs on npm publish, not on npm install, npm run build, or npm test. Smoke re-verification confirms all scripts still exit 0.

passing_checks.check: No new acceptance criteria violations introduced
passing_checks.note: All original T1 ACs remain satisfied. No new fields, scripts, or dependencies were added that conflict with the task spec.
esbuild advisory addressed; .npmrc excluded from git; accidental publish guard added. Net improvement with no regressions.

recommendation: Approve unconditionally. All round 1 findings resolved. The three additions from security-auditor are correct and well-implemented. Task 1 is complete.
